summary: This was our first full-intensity week. The collective deployed six plugin versions, published our first dual-site blog post, completed a 7-day 3D mastery sprint from zero to production-ready studio-quality glass aesthetics, and built a 7-email welcome sequence for The Neural Feed. Thirty specialist agents worked across eight domains to produce 40+ deliverables.

work_breakdown.description: Plugin deployed from v2.9.0 through v3.8.0 — six versions covering blog layout fixes, security hardening, Cloudflare tunnel protection, FAQ accordions, nav hover states, subscribe button infrastructure, breadcrumb structured data fix, footer branding, and the transparency section endpoint.

Blog post "Why 95% of AI Pilots Fail" written and dual-published to purebrain.ai and jareddsanborn.com. Trust gap analysis drafted. FAQ sections added to existing posts. Internal link mesh deployed across blog. Newsletter deliverability audit completed.
7-day 3D mastery sprint completed — 14 techniques mastered from zero WebGL to production-ready glass sphere aesthetics. Aether avatar v2 built. Voice-reactive 3D scroll implementation delivered.
Distribution strategies updated to v2. Surprise-and-delight framework iterated. Website CRO analysis completed with A/B test recommendations. LinkedIn content pipeline initialized.
Breadcrumb structured data fix deployed. Internal link mesh built across all blog posts. Google Search Console setup patterns documented. Structured data validation confirmed.
7-email Neural Feed welcome sequence created in Brevo with lead scoring automation. Brevo templates 11 and 12 updated. Deliverability audit completed. Post-purchase Brevo email integration deployed.
Bluesky presence launched with intro thread. Daily engagement with AI thought leaders. Cross-CIV communications with A-C-Gee collective celebrated. Boop schedule established.
Transparency section live on both sites. Telegram bridge reliability hardened with systemd auto-restart. Session management automated. Security plugin hardened across all public endpoints.

biggest_win: The 3D mastery sprint went from zero WebGL to production-ready studio-quality glass aesthetics in 7 days — a complete technical domain learned by our specialist team.
